TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Atayal, story: AtaNr-proposal_Takun
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: panqu'anaymu tikay ku gaga' nku ita' ka itaal i musa' i tumayi' mana'aring ga magalpu su kaal ku ulaqi' la ga ga.
S.PHON: panquʔanajmu tikaj ku ɣaɣaʔ nku itaʔ ka itaal i mus~ɕaʔ i tumajiʔ manaʔariŋ ɣa maɣalpu s~ɕu kaal ku ulaqiʔ la ɣa ɣa.
S.FORM: panqu'anaymu tikay ku gaga' nku ita' ka itaal i musa' i tumayi' mana'aring ga magalpu su kaal ku ulaqi' la ga ga.
S.PHON: panquʔanajmu tikaj ku ɣaɣaʔ nku itaʔ ka itaal i mus~ɕaʔ i tumajiʔ manaʔariŋ ɣa maɣalpu s~ɕu kaal ku ulaqiʔ la ɣa ɣa.
S.TRANSL: 我來敘述一些關於我們泰雅人去娶親的習俗,是等小孩到了十歲大就要開始準備的.
I'll describe some of the Atayal customs about making proposals for marriage, which usually starts when a child gets to ten years old.

S.FORM: tuliq ku yava' ru nku kanayril yaya' nku kanayril tam yava' nku tamalung yaya nku ulaqi' na tamalung mapatisal la ru.
S.PHON: tuliq ku ja*aʔ ru nku kanajril jajaʔ nku kanajril tam ja*aʔ nku tamaluŋ jaja nku ulaqiʔ na tamaluŋ mapatis~ɕal la ru.
S.FORM: tuliq ku yava' ru nku kanayril yaya' nku kanayril tam yava' nku tamalung yaya nku ulaqi' na tamalung mapatisal la ru.
S.PHON: tuliq ku ja*aʔ ru nku kanajril jajaʔ nku kanajril tam ja*aʔ nku tamaluŋ jaja nku ulaqiʔ na tamaluŋ mapatis~ɕal la ru.
S.TRANSL: 男孩的父母和女孩的父母會互相聊天.
The boy's parents and the girl's parents would set out to talk to each other.

S.FORM: il kia ku ulaqi'mu na kanayril maha ku kinsaxa'an kia ku ulaqi'mu na mak maliku maha ini'nha' tali su su piya' su kaal uwi huancen i maska' la ga i suqunawta' la ku maha makaal ru.
S.PHON: il kia ku ulaqiʔmu na kanajril maħa ku kins~ɕaxaʔan kia ku ulaqiʔmu na mak maliku maħa iniʔnħaʔ tali s~ɕu s~ɕu pijaʔ s~ɕu kaal uwi ħuanʦ~ʨen i mas~ɕkaʔ la ɣa i s~ɕuqunawtaʔ la ku maħa makaal ru.
S.FORM: il kia ku ulaqi'mu na kanayril maha ku kinsaxa'an kia ku ulaqi'mu na mak maliku maha ini'nha' tali su su piya' su kaal uwi huancen i maska' la ga i suqunawta' la ku maha makaal ru.
S.PHON: il kia ku ulaqiʔmu na kanajril maħa ku kins~ɕaxaʔan kia ku ulaqiʔmu na mak maliku maħa iniʔnħaʔ tali s~ɕu s~ɕu pijaʔ s~ɕu kaal uwi ħuanʦ~ʨen i mas~ɕkaʔ la ɣa i s~ɕuqunawtaʔ la ku maħa makaal ru.

TRANSL.notes: (一方)說我們有一個女孩,一方說我們有一個男孩,也不看他們的年齡,只要差不多,就可以結婚.

S.TRANSL: 說我們有一個女孩,一方說我們有一個男孩,也不看他們的年齡,只要差不多,就可以結婚.

TRANSL.notes: (The family of one side) says we have a girl, and the (family of the) other side says we have a boy. Without considering their age, as long as there is no big difference, they can get married.

S.TRANSL: says we have a girl, and the other side says we have a boy. Without considering their age, as long as there is no big difference, they can get married.

S.FORM: valinha' sikaal sku ulaqi' ku ku tumayi' han nanu' yaku navakis ku sumpung ru tuliq musa' vay i sumatu' su kavahniq.
S.PHON: *alinħaʔ s~ɕikaal s~ɕku ulaqiʔ ku ku tumajiʔ ħan nanuʔ jaku na*akis~ɕ ku s~ɕumpuŋ ru tuliq mus~ɕaʔ *aj i s~ɕumatuʔ s~ɕu ka*aħniq.
S.FORM: valinha' sikaal sku ulaqi' ku ku tumayi' han nanu' yaku navakis ku sumpung ru tuliq musa' vay i sumatu' su kavahniq.
S.PHON: *alinħaʔ s~ɕikaal s~ɕku ulaqiʔ ku ku tumajiʔ ħan nanuʔ jaku na*akis~ɕ ku s~ɕumpuŋ ru tuliq mus~ɕaʔ *aj i s~ɕumatuʔ s~ɕu ka*aħniq.
S.TRANSL: 他們不會告訴小孩婚嫁的事,是由老人家決定並開始去提親.
They won't tell the child about the marriage, and it is the elders who decide and set out to propose.

S.FORM: ku ulaqi' na tama yava' nku ulaqi' na tamalung ini' rasi ku ulaqi' mi.
S.PHON: ku ulaqiʔ na tama ja*aʔ nku ulaqiʔ na tamaluŋ iniʔ ras~ɕi ku ulaqiʔ mi.
S.FORM: ku ulaqi' na tama yava' nku ulaqi' na tamalung ini' rasi ku ulaqi' mi.
S.PHON: ku ulaqiʔ na tama ja*aʔ nku ulaqiʔ na tamaluŋ iniʔ ras~ɕi ku ulaqiʔ mi.

TRANSL.notes: 男孩的父親(去提親時)不會帶著男孩.

S.TRANSL: 男孩的父親 不會帶著男孩.

TRANSL.notes: The boy's father does not take the boy (when going to propose).

S.TRANSL: The boy's father does not take the boy .

S.FORM: musa' ru maki raniq ru siriq maha aruwa i kumalax ku sisiliq ga mavuinah ini' i usal.
S.PHON: mus~ɕaʔ ru maki raniq ru s~ɕiriq maħa aruwa i kumalax ku s~ɕis~ɕiliq ɣa ma*uinaħ iniʔ i us~ɕal.
S.FORM: musa' ru maki raniq ru siriq maha aruwa i kumalax ku sisiliq ga mavuinah ini' i usal.
S.PHON: mus~ɕaʔ ru maki raniq ru s~ɕiriq maħa aruwa i kumalax ku s~ɕis~ɕiliq ɣa ma*uinaħ iniʔ i us~ɕal.
S.TRANSL: 半路上如果聽到西西利鳥叫聲很急促,並往我們前進的路前方由上往下急飛,我們就不繼續前進.
When hearing the cry of Sisiliq bird on half of the way and seeing it fiercefully flying downward right blocking the way, we will not go any further.

S.FORM: i ukas ku sisiliq ka aruwa asi kulax la ga musa' ru tayhuk imuwag ga.
S.PHON: i ukas~ɕ ku s~ɕis~ɕiliq ka aruwa as~ɕi kulax la ɣa mus~ɕaʔ ru tajħuk imuwaɣ ɣa.
S.FORM: i ukas ku sisiliq ka aruwa asi kulax la ga musa' ru tayhuk imuwag ga.
S.PHON: i ukas~ɕ ku s~ɕis~ɕiliq ka aruwa as~ɕi kulax la ɣa mus~ɕaʔ ru tajħuk imuwaɣ ɣa.

TRANSL.notes: 如果沒有Sililiq鳥急飛下來,我們就會前往(女方)家中.

S.TRANSL: 如果沒有Sililiq鳥急飛下來,我們就會前往 家中.

TRANSL.notes: If there is no Sisiliq bird fiercefully flying downward, we will go and arrive at (the girl's) house.

S.TRANSL: If there is no Sisiliq bird fiercefully flying downward, we will go and arrive at house.

S.FORM: luqingun s i mutux maras tinmami'an maras su tinnaviq ru siquwi' i quwi'ani i vavawiq ki gi naniqun na xuwil mutux maha ku navakis sunga'.
S.PHON: luqiŋun s~ɕ i mutux maras~ɕ tinmamiʔan maras~ɕ s~ɕu tinna*iq ru s~ɕiquwiʔ i quwiʔani i *a*awiq ki ɣi naniqun na xuwil mutux maħa ku na*akis~ɕ s~ɕuŋaʔ.
S.FORM: luqingun s i mutux maras tinmami'an maras su tinnaviq ru siquwi' i quwi'ani i vavawiq ki gi naniqun na xuwil mutux maha ku navakis sunga'.
S.PHON: luqiŋun s~ɕ i mutux maras~ɕ tinmamiʔan maras~ɕ s~ɕu tinna*iq ru s~ɕiquwiʔ i quwiʔani i *a*awiq ki ɣi naniqun na xuwil mutux maħa ku na*akis~ɕ s~ɕuŋaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 以前的老人家都會說,通常會帶醃肉和麻糬去,要掛在樹上,才不會被狗吃掉.
The elders used to say that it is customary to bring preserved meat and rice cake and one would hang them on the tree in case the dog would eat them.

S.FORM: siquwi'nha' vavawiq kahuniq ru musa' ru musa' i tumayi'.
S.PHON: s~ɕiquwiʔnħaʔ *a*awiq kaħuniq ru mus~ɕaʔ ru mus~ɕaʔ i tumajiʔ.
S.FORM: siquwi'nha' vavawiq kahuniq ru musa' ru musa' i tumayi'.
S.PHON: s~ɕiquwiʔnħaʔ *a*awiq kaħuniq ru mus~ɕaʔ ru mus~ɕaʔ i tumajiʔ.
S.TRANSL: 把東西掛在樹上後,就去談親事.
They hang the things on the tree and go to talk about the marriage.

S.FORM: tumayi' ru mayayihung makaal.
S.PHON: tumajiʔ ru majajiħuŋ makaal.
S.FORM: tumayi' ru mayayihung makaal.
S.PHON: tumajiʔ ru majajiħuŋ makaal.
S.TRANSL: 他們用深奧的語言談婚事.
They discuss about the marriage in a difficult, elegant way.

S.FORM: ini' siwaal la ga nawsun lawwi ku naniqun niqun raniq ru muwah imuwag.
S.PHON: iniʔ s~ɕiwaal la ɣa naws~ɕun lawwi ku naniqun niqun raniq ru muwaħ imuwaɣ.
S.FORM: ini' siwaal la ga nawsun lawwi ku naniqun niqun raniq ru muwah imuwag.
S.PHON: iniʔ s~ɕiwaal la ɣa naws~ɕun lawwi ku naniqun niqun raniq ru muwaħ imuwaɣ.
S.TRANSL: 如果不答應,就順道把剛剛掛上去的東西再次拿下來,在回家的路上吃掉.
If they don't agree, they would bring the food back and eat them on the way home.

S.FORM: i i makamagalpu ga makamapitu' ga musa' lawwi musa' lawwi i tumayi'.
S.PHON: i i makamaɣalpu ɣa makamapituʔ ɣa mus~ɕaʔ lawwi mus~ɕaʔ lawwi i tumajiʔ.
S.FORM: i i makamagalpu ga makamapitu' ga musa' lawwi musa' lawwi i tumayi'.
S.PHON: i i makamaɣalpu ɣa makamapituʔ ɣa mus~ɕaʔ lawwi mus~ɕaʔ lawwi i tumajiʔ.
S.TRANSL: 又經過十天或七天,他們會再去提親.
After ten or seven days, they will go for the proposal again.

S.FORM: mahananu' ga ini' siwaal ku yaya' ga luqingunnha ku ulaqi' ru yaku yava' ku paspungunnha mi.
S.PHON: maħananuʔ ɣa iniʔ s~ɕiwaal ku jajaʔ ɣa luqiŋunnħa ku ulaqiʔ ru jaku ja*aʔ ku pas~ɕpuŋunnħa mi.
S.FORM: mahananu' ga ini' siwaal ku yaya' ga luqingunnha ku ulaqi' ru yaku yava' ku paspungunnha mi.
S.PHON: maħananuʔ ɣa iniʔ s~ɕiwaal ku jajaʔ ɣa luqiŋunnħa ku ulaqiʔ ru jaku ja*aʔ ku pas~ɕpuŋunnħa mi.
S.TRANSL: 如果母親不答應,他們會先把小孩藏起來,讓父親決定.
If the mother does not agree, they would hide the child and let the father decide.

S.FORM: ru ini' siwaal lawwi mavuwiynah lawwi 'i' ki'i makamagalpuw lawwi ga' musa' lawwi 'i' halannha kumaal ku tumuk nku qutux su qalang maha u halayta' tikay suwa' vay ka muwani ka ini' siwaal ini' kia a aqihnha' maha ru.
S.PHON: ru iniʔ s~ɕiwaal lawwi ma*uwijnaħ lawwi ʔiʔ kiʔi makamaɣalpuw lawwi ɣaʔ mus~ɕaʔ lawwi ʔiʔ ħalannħa kumaal ku tumuk nku qutux s~ɕu qalaŋ maħa u ħalajtaʔ tikaj s~ɕuwaʔ *aj ka muwani ka iniʔ s~ɕiwaal iniʔ kia a aqiħnħaʔ maħa ru.
S.FORM: ru ini' siwaal lawwi mavuwiynah lawwi 'i' ki'i makamagalpuw lawwi ga' musa' lawwi 'i' halannha kumaal ku tumuk nku qutux su qalang maha u halayta' tikay suwa' vay ka muwani ka ini' siwaal ini' kia a aqihnha' maha ru.
S.PHON: ru iniʔ s~ɕiwaal lawwi ma*uwijnaħ lawwi ʔiʔ kiʔi makamaɣalpuw lawwi ɣaʔ mus~ɕaʔ lawwi ʔiʔ ħalannħa kumaal ku tumuk nku qutux s~ɕu qalaŋ maħa u ħalajtaʔ tikaj s~ɕuwaʔ *aj ka muwani ka iniʔ s~ɕiwaal iniʔ kia a aqiħnħaʔ maħa ru.
S.TRANSL: 如果對方不答應,他們會回來,大約十天後再去告訴部落頭目,然後說:"我們去問頭目 為什麼對方不同意,是不是有他們不喜歡的地方.".
If they still don't agree, they would return and go tell the chief after ten days and say: "Let's go ask the chief why they do not agree or is there anything they don't like of us.".

S.FORM: musa' i rasun nku tumuk ru musa' i panqaquu' ru i.
S.PHON: mus~ɕaʔ i ras~ɕun nku tumuk ru mus~ɕaʔ i panqaquuʔ ru i.
S.FORM: musa' i rasun nku tumuk ru musa' i panqaquu' ru i.
S.PHON: mus~ɕaʔ i ras~ɕun nku tumuk ru mus~ɕaʔ i panqaquuʔ ru i.
S.TRANSL: 頭目就帶他們去而且一直講.
The chief would take them there and keeps persuading.

S.FORM: sumiwaal la ga tuliq ku tumuk ka vaiqannia' qutux samiyan su quwaw ku yava' nku ulaqi' na kanayril.
S.PHON: s~ɕumiwaal la ɣa tuliq ku tumuk ka *aiqanniaʔ qutux s~ɕamijan s~ɕu quwaw ku ja*aʔ nku ulaqiʔ na kanajril.
S.FORM: sumiwaal la ga tuliq ku tumuk ka vaiqannia' qutux samiyan su quwaw ku yava' nku ulaqi' na kanayril.
S.PHON: s~ɕumiwaal la ɣa tuliq ku tumuk ka *aiqanniaʔ qutux s~ɕamijan s~ɕu quwaw ku ja*aʔ nku ulaqiʔ na kanajril.
S.TRANSL: 同意後,頭目給女孩的爸爸一杯酒.
When they agree, the leader gives the girl's father a cup of wine.

S.FORM: nuvugunnia' la ga' gau aras a tawkan qinuwi' i tanux la san rasun vali vaqun nku ulaqi' na kanayril su musa' tumayi' mi.
S.PHON: nu*uɣunniaʔ la ɣaʔ ɣau aras~ɕ a tawkan qinuwiʔ i tanux la s~ɕan ras~ɕun *ali *aqun nku ulaqiʔ na kanajril s~ɕu mus~ɕaʔ tumajiʔ mi.
S.FORM: nuvugunnia' la ga' gau aras a tawkan qinuwi' i tanux la san rasun vali vaqun nku ulaqi' na kanayril su musa' tumayi' mi.
S.PHON: nu*uɣunniaʔ la ɣaʔ ɣau aras~ɕ a tawkan qinuwiʔ i tanux la s~ɕan ras~ɕun *ali *aqun nku ulaqiʔ na kanajril s~ɕu mus~ɕaʔ tumajiʔ mi.
S.TRANSL: 如果爸爸喝了酒,頭目就叫人把掛在外面的背籃帶進來,而女孩卻還不知道有人來娶親.

TRANSL.notes: (If the father) drinks the wine, the chief will ask someone to bring in the basket hung outside, and the girl still doesn't know that someone is coming to propose.

S.TRANSL: drinks the wine, the chief will ask someone to bring in the basket hung outside, and the girl still doesn't know that someone is coming to propose.

S.FORM: nanu' manavuwag ku yava' mahananu' ga i qaat kisiliq nku yaya' ga mutux i aruwa magiyai gi ini' vay kas'ang su tamalung ku kanayril sunga' kaisunnaha ku tamalung.
S.PHON: nanuʔ mana*uwaɣ ku ja*aʔ maħananuʔ ɣa i qaat kis~ɕiliq nku jajaʔ ɣa mutux i aruwa maɣijai ɣi iniʔ *aj kas~ɕʔaŋ s~ɕu tamaluŋ ku kanajril s~ɕuŋaʔ kais~ɕunnaħa ku tamaluŋ.
S.FORM: nanu' manavuwag ku yava' mahananu' ga i qaat kisiliq nku yaya' ga mutux i aruwa magiyai gi ini' vay kas'ang su tamalung ku kanayril sunga' kaisunnaha ku tamalung.
S.PHON: nanuʔ mana*uwaɣ ku ja*aʔ maħananuʔ ɣa i qaat kis~ɕiliq nku jajaʔ ɣa mutux i aruwa maɣijai ɣi iniʔ *aj kas~ɕʔaŋ s~ɕu tamaluŋ ku kanajril s~ɕuŋaʔ kais~ɕunnaħa ku tamaluŋ.

TRANSL.notes: (儘管)爸爸喝了酒,如果媽媽不喜歡,他會離開(不參與喝酒).因為以前的女人不敢頂撞自己的丈夫.

S.TRANSL: 爸爸喝了酒,如果媽媽不喜歡,他會離開 .因為以前的女人不敢頂撞自己的丈夫.

TRANSL.notes: (Though) the father drinks the wine, if the mother doesn't like it, she would not participate in the drinking because women did not dare to argue against their husbands before.

S.TRANSL: the father drinks the wine, if the mother doesn't like it, she would not participate in the drinking because women did not dare to argue against their husbands before.

S.FORM: nas kiyumun nku ivuwi ga u uwah i manavuwag san nku tamalungnia' la ga muwah la.
S.PHON: nas~ɕ kijumun nku i*uwi ɣa u uwaħ i mana*uwaɣ s~ɕan nku tamaluŋniaʔ la ɣa muwaħ la.
S.FORM: nas kiyumun nku ivuwi ga u uwah i manavuwag san nku tamalungnia' la ga muwah la.
S.PHON: nas~ɕ kijumun nku i*uwi ɣa u uwaħ i mana*uwaɣ s~ɕan nku tamaluŋniaʔ la ɣa muwaħ la.
S.TRANSL: 丈夫找太太,叫她過來喝杯酒,她才會過來.
The husband would look for his wife and ask her to come over for a drink, then she would come.

S.FORM: musa' sumatu' kavahniq ku yani han ru muwah la ru sumku' su riax.
S.PHON: mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕumatuʔ ka*aħniq ku jani ħan ru muwaħ la ru s~ɕumkuʔ s~ɕu riax.
S.FORM: musa' sumatu' kavahniq ku yani han ru muwah la ru sumku' su riax.
S.PHON: mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕumatuʔ ka*aħniq ku jani ħan ru muwaħ la ru s~ɕumkuʔ s~ɕu riax.
S.TRANSL: 然後他們來送聘禮,並決定日期.
Then they will come to send gifts and decide on the date.

S.FORM: sumku' su riax ru mus makapiya' maha ini' kusa' maha ciyuecihao gi vali kia' a viru nku' itaal sunga'.
S.PHON: s~ɕumkuʔ s~ɕu riax ru mus~ɕ makapijaʔ maħa iniʔ kus~ɕaʔ maħa ʦ~ʨijueʦ~ʨiħao ɣi *ali kiaʔ a *iru nkuʔ itaal s~ɕuŋaʔ.
S.FORM: sumku' su riax ru mus makapiya' maha ini' kusa' maha ciyuecihao gi vali kia' a viru nku' itaal sunga'.
S.PHON: s~ɕumkuʔ s~ɕu riax ru mus~ɕ makapijaʔ maħa iniʔ kus~ɕaʔ maħa ʦ~ʨijueʦ~ʨiħao ɣi *ali kiaʔ a *iru nkuʔ itaal s~ɕuŋaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 去定日期時,我們不說幾月幾號,因為以前泰雅人沒有日曆.
When deciding on the date, we would not refer to the exact date because the Atayal people didn't have calendars before.

S.FORM: asinaha' i sapungi nku riax maqilaap ru tihuway ga qutux su riax maha ku lalapgannaha' sunga' ru.
S.PHON: as~ɕinaħaʔ i s~ɕapuŋi nku riax maqilaap ru tiħuwaj ɣa qutux s~ɕu riax maħa ku lalapɣannaħaʔ s~ɕuŋaʔ ru.
S.FORM: asinaha' i sapungi nku riax maqilaap ru tihuway ga qutux su riax maha ku lalapgannaha' sunga' ru.
S.PHON: as~ɕinaħaʔ i s~ɕapuŋi nku riax maqilaap ru tiħuwaj ɣa qutux s~ɕu riax maħa ku lalapɣannaħaʔ s~ɕuŋaʔ ru.
S.TRANSL: 我們只能用睡覺、起床當做一天,來算日子.
We could only measure the time between going to sleep and waking up as a day and counted days in this way.

S.FORM: musa' tumayi' ru ga vaqun hayhay nku ulaqi' na kanayril la.
S.PHON: mus~ɕaʔ tumajiʔ ru ɣa *aqun ħajħaj nku ulaqiʔ na kanajril la.
S.FORM: musa' tumayi' ru ga vaqun hayhay nku ulaqi' na kanayril la.
S.PHON: mus~ɕaʔ tumajiʔ ru ɣa *aqun ħajħaj nku ulaqiʔ na kanajril la.
S.TRANSL: 在去提親之後,女孩大概知道一些有關婚姻、提親的事.
After the proposal, the girl would then know a bit about the marriage.

S.FORM: ga' vali maksawbih ku 'ulaqi' na tamalung kinku ulaqi' na tama na kanayril gi henpaosho vay su sunga' vay mi.
S.PHON: ɣaʔ *ali maks~ɕawβiħ ku ʔulaqiʔ na tamaluŋ kinku ulaqiʔ na tama na kanajril ɣi ħenpaos~ɕħo *aj s~ɕu s~ɕuŋaʔ *aj mi.
S.FORM: ga' vali maksawbih ku 'ulaqi' na tamalung kinku ulaqi' na tama na kanayril gi henpaosho vay su sunga' vay mi.
S.PHON: ɣaʔ *ali maks~ɕawβiħ ku ʔulaqiʔ na tamaluŋ kinku ulaqiʔ na tama na kanajril ɣi ħenpaos~ɕħo *aj s~ɕu s~ɕuŋaʔ *aj mi.
S.TRANSL: 男孩和女孩不能互相靠近,因為以前很保守.
The boy and the girl could not get close to each other because we were very conservative in the past.

S.FORM: ru manavuwag lawwi ru mahananu makaqutux makarusa' manabuwag muwah imuwag ru'.
S.PHON: ru mana*uwaɣ lawwi ru maħananu makaqutux makarus~ɕaʔ manaβuwaɣ muwaħ imuwaɣ ruʔ.
S.FORM: ru manavuwag lawwi ru mahananu makaqutux makarusa' manabuwag muwah imuwag ru'.
S.PHON: ru mana*uwaɣ lawwi ru maħananu makaqutux makarus~ɕaʔ manaβuwaɣ muwaħ imuwaɣ ruʔ.
S.TRANSL: 然後再次喝酒,有時候喝一天、兩天,然後回家.
The family would drink again and sometimes keep drinking for one or two days and then come home.

S.FORM: i sku'unnaha' ku kai' maha u sku'awta' sku kumiloh la ga a ta' masina su kai la.
S.PHON: i s~ɕkuʔunnaħaʔ ku kaiʔ maħa u s~ɕkuʔawtaʔ s~ɕku kumiloħ la ɣa a taʔ mas~ɕina s~ɕu kai la.
S.FORM: i sku'unnaha' ku kai' maha u sku'awta' sku kumiloh la ga a ta' masina su kai la.
S.PHON: i s~ɕkuʔunnaħaʔ ku kaiʔ maħa u s~ɕkuʔawtaʔ s~ɕku kumiloħ la ɣa a taʔ mas~ɕina s~ɕu kai la.
S.TRANSL: 他們把去求親的日期定在收割後.
They would decide on the date of proposal after the harvest.

S.FORM: gi numaga' su kakalhun ku navakis sunga' vali kia naniqun la ku tayhuk vay sku' kumiloh la ga' musa' masina' su kai' la.
S.PHON: ɣi numaɣaʔ s~ɕu kakalħun ku na*akis~ɕ s~ɕuŋaʔ *ali kia naniqun la ku tajħuk *aj s~ɕkuʔ kumiloħ la ɣaʔ mus~ɕaʔ mas~ɕinaʔ s~ɕu kaiʔ la.
S.FORM: gi numaga' su kakalhun ku navakis sunga' vali kia naniqun la ku tayhuk vay sku' kumiloh la ga' musa' masina' su kai' la.
S.PHON: ɣi numaɣaʔ s~ɕu kakalħun ku na*akis~ɕ s~ɕuŋaʔ *ali kia naniqun la ku tajħuk *aj s~ɕkuʔ kumiloħ la ɣaʔ mus~ɕaʔ mas~ɕinaʔ s~ɕu kaiʔ la.
S.TRANSL: 因為以前老人家要等稻收割後,才有食物去求親.
That is because, in the old times, it is only after the harvest that the people could get some food for the proposal.

S.FORM: musa' masina' su kai' skuunta' kanuwan maha ini' kaingasu ku yani la gi gi yaku pati' kinluhnaha' gi ingasu rarima'naha pataqrun la ga.
S.PHON: mus~ɕaʔ mas~ɕinaʔ s~ɕu kaiʔ s~ɕkuuntaʔ kanuwan maħa iniʔ kaiŋas~ɕu ku jani la ɣi ɣi jaku patiʔ kinluħnaħaʔ ɣi iŋas~ɕu rarimaʔnaħa pataqrun la ɣa.
S.FORM: musa' masina' su kai' skuunta' kanuwan maha ini' kaingasu ku yani la gi gi yaku pati' kinluhnaha' gi ingasu rarima'naha pataqrun la ga.
S.PHON: mus~ɕaʔ mas~ɕinaʔ s~ɕu kaiʔ s~ɕkuuntaʔ kanuwan maħa iniʔ kaiŋas~ɕu ku jani la ɣi ɣi jaku patiʔ kinluħnaħaʔ ɣi iŋas~ɕu rarimaʔnaħa pataqrun la ɣa.
S.TRANSL: 去提親不能拖太久,因為收割完的稻子會先被吃完.
The proposal cannot be postponed for too long because the harvested rice would then be all eaten up.

S.FORM: lap paka'ukas lawwi a 'a'agalnaha' su ulaqi' la.
S.PHON: lap pakaʔukas~ɕ lawwi a ʔaʔaɣalnaħaʔ s~ɕu ulaqiʔ la.
S.FORM: lap paka'ukas lawwi a 'a'agalnaha' su ulaqi' la.
S.PHON: lap pakaʔukas~ɕ lawwi a ʔaʔaɣalnaħaʔ s~ɕu ulaqiʔ la.

TRANSL.notes: (如果沒有食物),他們就不能再去求親了.

S.TRANSL: ,他們就不能再去求親了.

TRANSL.notes: (If there is no more food), they cannot go there to marry the child.

S.TRANSL: , they cannot go there to marry the child.

S.FORM: u makurisa ga suqunawta' maha ku pinkalannaha' mahananu ga qutux pinhangiqan mahananu ga makamagalpu.
S.PHON: u makuris~ɕa ɣa s~ɕuqunawtaʔ maħa ku pinkalannaħaʔ maħananu ɣa qutux pinħaŋiqan maħananu ɣa makamaɣalpu.
S.FORM: u makurisa ga suqunawta' maha ku pinkalannaha' mahananu ga qutux pinhangiqan mahananu ga makamagalpu.
S.PHON: u makuris~ɕa ɣa s~ɕuqunawtaʔ maħa ku pinkalannaħaʔ maħananu ɣa qutux pinħaŋiqan maħananu ɣa makamaɣalpu.
S.TRANSL: 結婚有時候要花一星期,有時候要花十天的時間.
Their discussion of marriage sometimes takes a week, sometimes ten days.

S.FORM: tuliq ku ulaqi' na kanayril kinku ulaqi' na tamalung ga ini'naha vaqi vaqunnaha' hayhay asikinaga atu' na musa' ruma su waw ku ulaqi' na tamalung ga ini'naha' suquni paqilaap.
S.PHON: tuliq ku ulaqiʔ na kanajril kinku ulaqiʔ na tamaluŋ ɣa iniʔnaħa *aqi *aqunnaħaʔ ħajħaj as~ɕikinaɣa atuʔ na mus~ɕaʔ ruma s~ɕu waw ku ulaqiʔ na tamaluŋ ɣa iniʔnaħaʔ s~ɕuquni paqilaap.
S.FORM: tuliq ku ulaqi' na kanayril kinku ulaqi' na tamalung ga ini'naha vaqi vaqunnaha' hayhay asikinaga atu' na musa' ruma su waw ku ulaqi' na tamalung ga ini'naha' suquni paqilaap.
S.PHON: tuliq ku ulaqiʔ na kanajril kinku ulaqiʔ na tamaluŋ ɣa iniʔnaħa *aqi *aqunnaħaʔ ħajħaj as~ɕikinaɣa atuʔ na mus~ɕaʔ ruma s~ɕu waw ku ulaqiʔ na tamaluŋ ɣa iniʔnaħaʔ s~ɕuquni paqilaap.

TRANSL.notes: 此時男孩和女孩開始對提親這件事有些瞭解,但是如果男孩(到女孩家)去工作,他們不能睡在一起.

S.TRANSL: 此時男孩和女孩開始對提親這件事有些瞭解,但是如果男孩 去工作,他們不能睡在一起.

TRANSL.notes: Now the boy and the girl begin to know something about the marriage, but if the boy goes (to the girl's house) to help with the work, they cannot sleep together.

S.TRANSL: Now the boy and the girl begin to know something about the marriage, but if the boy goes to help with the work, they cannot sleep together.

S.FORM: sku'un nanak ku ulaqi' na tamalung sku'un nanak ku ulaqi' na kanayril nan tiku ri'ax hani la ga ki'i yamagal su kaal qu ga pitu' su kaal la ru' magaalpu mamatu su kaal la ku ulaqi' na kanayril la.
S.PHON: s~ɕkuʔun nanak ku ulaqiʔ na tamaluŋ s~ɕkuʔun nanak ku ulaqiʔ na kanajril nan tiku riʔax ħani la ɣa kiʔi jamaɣal s~ɕu kaal qu ɣa pituʔ s~ɕu kaal la ruʔ maɣaalpu mamatu s~ɕu kaal la ku ulaqiʔ na kanajril la.
S.FORM: sku'un nanak ku ulaqi' na tamalung sku'un nanak ku ulaqi' na kanayril nan tiku ri'ax hani la ga ki'i yamagal su kaal qu ga pitu' su kaal la ru' magaalpu mamatu su kaal la ku ulaqi' na kanayril la.
S.PHON: s~ɕkuʔun nanak ku ulaqiʔ na tamaluŋ s~ɕkuʔun nanak ku ulaqiʔ na kanajril nan tiku riʔax ħani la ɣa kiʔi jamaɣal s~ɕu kaal qu ɣa pituʔ s~ɕu kaal la ruʔ maɣaalpu mamatu s~ɕu kaal la ku ulaqiʔ na kanajril la.
S.TRANSL: 男孩子和女孩子各自睡個字的.這個期間對於男孩子和女孩子大概持續七年或六年.
The boy and the girl would sleep alone separately. This may last for seven or six years for both of them.

S.FORM: zhege tiku ri'ax yani ga mutux musa' i rumag su waw ku ulaqi' tamalung.
S.PHON: *ħeɣe tiku riʔax jani ɣa mutux mus~ɕaʔ i rumaɣ s~ɕu waw ku ulaqiʔ tamaluŋ.
S.FORM: zhege tiku ri'ax yani ga mutux musa' i rumag su waw ku ulaqi' tamalung.
S.PHON: *ħeɣe tiku riʔax jani ɣa mutux mus~ɕaʔ i rumaɣ s~ɕu waw ku ulaqiʔ tamaluŋ.

TRANSL.notes: 在這段期間,男孩子會去(女方)家裡幫忙家務.

S.TRANSL: 在這段期間,男孩子會去 家裡幫忙家務.

TRANSL.notes: During these years, it is common for the boy to go (to the girl's house) help with household.

S.TRANSL: During these years, it is common for the boy to go help with household.

S.FORM: ru sku'unnha' ku' kai' la i ptari' masina' su kai' la ga suqununnha' la taihuk ku ri'ax ka suqununnha' la ga s masuqun la ru.
S.PHON: ru s~ɕkuʔunnħaʔ kuʔ kaiʔ la i ptariʔ mas~ɕinaʔ s~ɕu kaiʔ la ɣa s~ɕuqununnħaʔ la taiħuk ku riʔax ka s~ɕuqununnħaʔ la ɣa s~ɕ mas~ɕuqun la ru.
S.FORM: ru sku'unnha' ku' kai' la i ptari' masina' su kai' la ga suqununnha' la taihuk ku ri'ax ka suqununnha' la ga s masuqun la ru.
S.PHON: ru s~ɕkuʔunnħaʔ kuʔ kaiʔ la i ptariʔ mas~ɕinaʔ s~ɕu kaiʔ la ɣa s~ɕuqununnħaʔ la taiħuk ku riʔax ka s~ɕuqununnħaʔ la ɣa s~ɕ mas~ɕuqun la ru.
S.TRANSL: 當他們的婚事已經確定,到了結婚的那一天,他們就能夠住在一起.
When their marriage has been decided, they can the live together when the day of their wedding has come.

S.FORM: nanu' tiku masuqun ka ri'ax yani ga manavuwag han ku navakis ru naqru' manavuag sku imuwag nku ulaqi' na tamalung la ga satu'un lawwi ku gumisiyuk salun ku yani pasiyuk salun ku ku kakalan ka yani musa' lawwi sku ulaqi' na kanayril ru nin ki'i makarusa' manavuwag kia.
S.PHON: nanuʔ tiku mas~ɕuqun ka riʔax jani ɣa mana*uwaɣ ħan ku na*akis~ɕ ru naqruʔ mana*uaɣ s~ɕku imuwaɣ nku ulaqiʔ na tamaluŋ la ɣa s~ɕatuʔun lawwi ku ɣumis~ɕijuk s~ɕalun ku jani pas~ɕijuk s~ɕalun ku ku kakalan ka jani mus~ɕaʔ lawwi s~ɕku ulaqiʔ na kanajril ru nin kiʔi makarus~ɕaʔ mana*uwaɣ kia.
S.FORM: nanu' tiku masuqun ka ri'ax yani ga manavuwag han ku navakis ru naqru' manavuag sku imuwag nku ulaqi' na tamalung la ga satu'un lawwi ku gumisiyuk salun ku yani pasiyuk salun ku ku kakalan ka yani musa' lawwi sku ulaqi' na kanayril ru nin ki'i makarusa' manavuwag kia.
S.PHON: nanuʔ tiku mas~ɕuqun ka riʔax jani ɣa mana*uwaɣ ħan ku na*akis~ɕ ru naqruʔ mana*uaɣ s~ɕku imuwaɣ nku ulaqiʔ na tamaluŋ la ɣa s~ɕatuʔun lawwi ku ɣumis~ɕijuk s~ɕalun ku jani pas~ɕijuk s~ɕalun ku ku kakalan ka jani mus~ɕaʔ lawwi s~ɕku ulaqiʔ na kanajril ru nin kiʔi makarus~ɕaʔ mana*uwaɣ kia.

TRANSL.notes: 結婚的那天,老人家們就先喝酒.在男孩子家喝完了以後,(女方)會送禮給男方,這個說法叫做回禮,那就是(雙方家人)再去女方家裡招待(喝酒),大概喝兩天.

S.TRANSL: 結婚的那天,老人家們就先喝酒.在男孩子家喝完了以後, 會送禮給男方,這個說法叫做回禮,那就是 再去女方家裡招待 ,大概喝兩天.

TRANSL.notes: On the wedding day, the elders would drink first. When they finish drinking at the boy's house, a present would be given (by the girl's family), which is called, in a way of saying, a gift in return; that is, everyone will go to (drink at) the girl's house, and stay there drinking for about two days.

S.TRANSL: On the wedding day, the elders would drink first. When they finish drinking at the boy's house, a present would be given , which is called, in a way of saying, a gift in return; that is, everyone will go to the girl's house, and stay there drinking for about two days.

S.FORM: halayta' gumlu tikay lawwi ku ulaqi'ta' na kanayril lawwi maha muwah manavuag lawwi sku ulaqi' na tamalung ru.
S.PHON: ħalajtaʔ ɣumlu tikaj lawwi ku ulaqiʔtaʔ na kanajril lawwi maħa muwaħ mana*uaɣ lawwi s~ɕku ulaqiʔ na tamaluŋ ru.
S.FORM: halayta' gumlu tikay lawwi ku ulaqi'ta' na kanayril lawwi maha muwah manavuag lawwi sku ulaqi' na tamalung ru.
S.PHON: ħalajtaʔ ɣumlu tikaj lawwi ku ulaqiʔtaʔ na kanajril lawwi maħa muwaħ mana*uaɣ lawwi s~ɕku ulaqiʔ na tamaluŋ ru.
S.TRANSL: 我們就再跟著我們的女兒去到男孩子家喝酒.
We would again follow our girl to go to drink at the boy's house.

S.FORM: ru kis'i manatuul muwani la ga.
S.PHON: ru kis~ɕʔi manatuul muwani la ɣa.
S.FORM: ru kis'i manatuul muwani la ga.
S.PHON: ru kis~ɕʔi manatuul muwani la ɣa.
S.TRANSL: 大概再這樣三次.
This would be repeated about three times.

S.FORM: manaqilang i masuqun la ku ulaqi' na tamalung kinku ulaqi' na kanayril.
S.PHON: manaqilaŋ i mas~ɕuqun la ku ulaqiʔ na tamaluŋ kinku ulaqiʔ na kanajril.
S.FORM: manaqilang i masuqun la ku ulaqi' na tamalung kinku ulaqi' na kanayril.
S.PHON: manaqilaŋ i mas~ɕuqun la ku ulaqiʔ na tamaluŋ kinku ulaqiʔ na kanajril.
S.TRANSL: 最後,男孩子和女孩子就結婚.
Finally, the boy and the girl get married.

S.FORM: nanu yani la.
S.PHON: nanu jani la.
S.FORM: nanu yani la.
S.PHON: nanu jani la.
S.TRANSL: 就這樣.
That's it.

S.FORM: ... syesye.
S.PHON: ... s~ɕjes~ɕje.
S.FORM: ... syesye.
S.PHON: ... s~ɕjes~ɕje.
S.TRANSL: 謝謝.
Thank you.
